name: aura_code_intelligence
title: Aura Code Intelligence
description: Sync vulnerability findings, code patterns, and security metrics from Aura to your data warehouse
author: Aenea Labs

steps.title: Get API Credentials
steps.description: Log in to your Aura dashboard and navigate to Settings > API Keys to generate a new API key.

steps.title: Find Organization ID
steps.description: Your Organization ID can be found in Settings > Organization. Copy the ID shown there.

steps.title: Configure Connection
steps.description: Enter your Aura Server URL (e.g., https://api.aenealabs.com), API Key, and Organization ID in the fields below.

server_url.title: Aura Server URL
server_url.description: The URL of your Aura API server

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your Aura API key for authentication

findings.description: Security vulnerability findings from code scans

code_patterns.description: Code patterns and relationships from GraphRAG analysis

metrics.description: Security and code quality metrics over time
